name: minilozio--video-analyzer-skill
description: Download, transcribe, and analyze videos from YouTube, X/Twitter, and TikTok with local Whisper processing. Perfect for extracting TL;DRs, timestamps, and actionable insights. Use when asked to transcribe a video, summarize a YouTube video, extract key points from a podcast or talk, analyze what someone said in a video, get timestamps from a long video, or when the user shares any YouTube, X/Twitter, or TikTok video URL and wants to know what's in it.
